title: Fullstory brings behavioral data into AI tools with MCP and StoryAI Agents
friendlyTitle: Fullstory is connecting customer behavior data to AI tools
summary: Fullstory introduced Fullstory MCP, StoryAI Agents, and Workflow Intelligence to connect behavioral analytics with AI tools such as Claude, ChatGPT, Cursor, and Gemini. The products are designed to detect user friction, investigate sessions, answer analytics questions, and surface internal workflow bottlenecks.
friendlySummary: Fullstory launched tools that let AI systems use product and workflow data to find problems, answer questions, and spot user frustration.
whyItMatters: AI gets more useful at work when it can read the right operational context without manual exports. For product, support, and operations teams, MCP-style data access could shorten the path from noticing a problem to diagnosing and fixing it.
friendlyWhyItMatters: This can help teams understand customer problems faster, without spending hours exporting data and checking sessions by hand.
